user.title: Configure Stroomprijsprognose
user.description: Enter your postal code and country to get electricity price forecasts including grid fees, levies, and VAT.

data_description.plz: Your postal code determines the local grid operator and fees.
data_description.country: Supported: DE, NL, BE, AT, CH, LU

error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This postal code and country combination is already configured.

init.title: Stroomprijsprognose Options
init.description: Customize forecast settings and price calculation overrides.

data_description.hours: Number of forecast hours to fetch (1-96). Default: 72.
data_description.update_interval: How often to refresh data (5-60 minutes). Default: 15.
data_description.supplier_markup_ct_kwh: Leave empty to use the API's default for your grid area.
data_description.levies_and_taxes_ct_kwh: Leave empty to use the API's default for your grid area.
data_description.vat_percent: Leave empty to use the API's default. DE default: 19%.

force_refresh.name: Force refresh
force_refresh.description: Immediately re-fetch the electricity price forecast.
